---
name: Question or help
about: Ask how to do something with @kahitsan/ksui.
title: "[Question]: "
labels: ["question"]
---

Welcome. Questions are fine here, so do not worry about filing this as a bug.

**What do you want to do?**
Tell us the thing you are trying to do, like "how do I use the voucher picker" or "how do I wire up the host kit".

**What have you tried so far?**
Share any code or steps you already tried. It is okay if you have not tried anything yet.

**Your setup (if it helps)**
- @kahitsan/ksui version:
- SolidJS version:
- Does your app provide "@kserp/host-ui"? (yes / no / not sure)

A small note: some ksui components are built for our ERP product (Hilinga). These include pickers for clients, vouchers, and payment accounts. If your question is about one of these ERP-specific components, this is the right place to ask.
